featuresSection.title: Built to Last. Engineered to Perform.
featuresSection.subtitle: From transmission mains to industrial process lines, Mangalam HDPE delivers precision-engineered piping for every stage of your infrastructure.

cards.title: Superior Chemical Resistance
cards.body: HDPE pipes resist a wide range of chemicals, acids, and alkalis. Unlike metal pipes, they won't corrode, rust, or scale, ensuring pure water quality and extended service life in aggressive environments.

items.question: What pressure classes do Mangalam HDPE pipes support?
items.answer: Our range covers PN 2.5 through PN 16 depending on diameter and SDR. Project-specific rating tables are available in the technical datasheet and our team can help you select the right class for your application.

items.question: What jointing methods are recommended for buried mains?
items.answer: Butt fusion and electrofusion are the primary methods for pressure-rated joints. Mechanical fittings may be used where approved for the service class. Fusion procedures should follow manufacturer guidelines and trained installer practice.

items.question: How does HDPE perform in aggressive soils or effluent?
items.answer: HDPE is highly resistant to corrosion and many chemicals compared to metallic systems. For unusual chemistry, refer to compatibility guidance or request a project review from our applications team.

items.question: What lengths are available for coil products?
items.answer: Coil lengths depend on diameter and transport limits; long continuous lengths are a key benefit of HDPE. Contact us with your diameter and route length for available coil options.

items.question: Can products be supplied with third-party certification documentation?
items.answer: Yes. We support BIS, ISO, and project-specific documentation packages. Specify your requirements when requesting a quote or catalogue.

catalogueCta.subtitle: Enter your email and an expert will share the catalogue with you.

applicationsSection.title: Versatile Applications Across Industries
applicationsSection.subtitle: From water infrastructure to industrial process lines, our HDPE piping systems deliver reliable performance across diverse installation environments.

cards.title: Water Distribution Networks
cards.description: Potable water transmission and distribution mains with butt- and electrofusion joints, low leakage risk, and 50+ year design life in urban, peri-urban, and rural water supply schemes.
cards.imageAlt: Industrial site crew handling materials for water infrastructure piping

cards.title: Industrial Process Piping
cards.description: Chemical-resistant PE100 systems for process water, effluent headers, and cooling water loops where metallic corrosion, scaling, and unplanned shutdowns are unacceptable.
cards.imageAlt: Workers on site with industrial mesh and piping materials

cards.title: Gas & Utility Ducting
cards.description: Engineered polyethylene solutions for approved gas distribution, cable protection, and utility ducting with batch traceability, marking, and conformance to project standards.
cards.imageAlt: Safety crew handling industrial netting near utility works

cards.title: Mining & Site Services
cards.description: Rugged temporary and permanent lines for mine dewatering, process water, and slurry handling where abrasion resistance, coil lengths, and rapid field deployment count.
cards.imageAlt: Mining or construction workers with safety gear and materials

cards.title: Agricultural Irrigation
cards.description: Large-diameter and coil HDPE for pressurised irrigation networks, lift schemes, and distribution laterals with UV-stabilised black compound options for exposed runs.
cards.imageAlt: Field operations crew with industrial equipment

cards.title: Wastewater & Reuse
cards.description: Sewerage rising mains, treatment plant interconnects, and reclaimed-water lines benefiting from corrosion immunity, smooth bore hydraulics, and leak-tested fusion joints.
cards.imageAlt: Industrial workers handling netting on a project deck

cards.title: Marine & Coastal Outfalls
cards.description: Diffuser and outfall pipelines where flexibility, joint integrity, and resistance to salt spray and tidal zones support long service in harsh coastal environments.
cards.imageAlt: Deck crew handling bright industrial netting

cards.title: Power & Desalination
cards.description: Cooling water circuits, intake and reject lines, and balance-of-plant services where dimensional stability, pressure rating tables, and documented fusion procedures simplify QA.
cards.imageAlt: Industrial safety team with materials on site

manufacturingSection.title: Advanced HDPE Pipe Manufacturing Process
manufacturingSection.subtitle: Our state-of-the-art extrusion technology ensures consistent quality, optimal material properties, and dimensional accuracy in every pipe we manufacture.

steps.label: Raw Material
steps.body: Virgin PE100 compound is sourced and verified for density, melt flow, and UV stabilisation so every batch meets specification before extrusion.
bullets: PE100 grade material with full traceability
Optimal molecular weight distribution for pressure rating

steps.label: Extrusion
steps.body: Single-screw extrusion with temperature and pressure control delivers a homogeneous melt profile and stable output for consistent wall thickness.

steps.label: Cooling
steps.body: Calibration and cooling tanks stabilise dimensions and relieve residual stresses before downstream sizing.

steps.label: Sizing
steps.body: Sizing tooling and on-line gauging keep OD, wall thickness, and ovality within tight tolerances.

steps.label: Quality Control
steps.body: Destructive and non-destructive checks validate mechanical properties, fusion compatibility, and marking accuracy.
bullets: Pressure and impact testing as per scope

steps.label: Marking
steps.body: Laser or embossed marking carries standard references, production date, and batch codes for full traceability.

steps.label: Cutting
steps.body: Cut-to-length systems deliver square ends ready for field fusion or coupling.

steps.label: Packaging
steps.body: Coils and straight lengths are bundled and protected for safe transport to site.

trustSection.title: Trusted Performance. Proven Results.
trustSection.subtitle: Engineering teams and contractors rely on Mangalam HDPE for dependable fusion systems, documentation, and field support on critical infrastructure.

quotes.headline: Fusion-jointed HDPE reduced leakage callbacks on our last 40 km trunk main.
quotes.text: The documentation package made third-party inspection straightforward.
quotes.author: Project Engineer, Regional Water Board

quotes.headline: We standardised on PE100 for industrial effluent headers.
quotes.text: Chemical resistance and coil lengths cut installation time compared to our previous metallic system.
quotes.author: Maintenance Head, Process Plant

quotes.headline: Responsive technical support during tender stage
quotes.text: Helped us lock in the right SDR and jointing method for a high-pressure irrigation scheme.
quotes.author: Procurement Lead, Agri Infrastructure

quotes.headline: Municipal reticulation upgrades stayed on programme.
quotes.text: Coil lengths and butt-fusion training from the supplier meant fewer joints in trenches and cleaner as-built records for the city engineer.
quotes.author: Site Supervisor, Urban Water Utility

quotes.headline: HDPE held up where steel had corroded in eighteen months.
quotes.text: We replaced coastal outfall headers with PE100; no galvanic issues and the crew appreciated the lighter handling on the jetty.
quotes.author: Marine Works Contractor

quotes.headline: Butt-fusion QA packs satisfied the owner’s verifier.
quotes.text: Traceability from resin batch to field joint number was exactly what the EPC needed before hydrostatic sign-off.
quotes.author: QA Manager, EPC Consortium

quotes.headline: Mining site dewatering lines see stone impact and vibration.
quotes.text: We’ve run these coils for three seasons without a fatigue failure; shutdown windows are short so reliability matters.
quotes.author: Reliability Engineer, Open-Pit Mine

quotes.headline: Gas distribution tie-ins needed documented fusion parameters.
quotes.text: The field team followed the approved procedure deck; regulator questions were answered with datasheets and joint logs, not guesswork.
quotes.author: Pipeline Lead, City Gas Network
